assertions.assertion: A class extending DefaultRefreshTokenService is defined
assertions.rationale: DefaultRefreshTokenService as a base class is a Duende-specific extension point not widely known.

assertions.assertion: The AcceptConsumedTokenAsync method is overridden to allow consumed tokens within a 30-second grace window using ConsumedTime
assertions.rationale: AcceptConsumedTokenAsync is a Duende-specific virtual method name.

assertions.assertion: The service is registered as IRefreshTokenService in the DI container
assertions.rationale: IRefreshTokenService is a known interface for custom refresh token logic.

assertions.assertion: The mobile_app client has RefreshTokenUsage set to TokenUsage.OneTimeOnly
DeleteOneTimeOnlyRefreshTokensOnUse is set to false in the persistent grant options or operational store options
assertions.rationale: DeleteOneTimeOnlyRefreshTokensOnUse is a Duende-specific option unlikely to be known without docs.
